projectDescription: Browser extension to automatically mute X.com users from specified countries using X's country detection feature
keyFeatures: Automatic country-based muting using X.com's AboutAccountQuery API
Instant post hiding with blurred overlay matching X.com theme
Customizable country blacklist with whitelist support
Following protection (skip muting users you follow)
Persistent cache with 24-hour TTL for countries and user IDs
Mute database tracking with CSV export
Cross-browser support (Chrome/Edge Manifest V3, Firefox Manifest V2)
publicApiSurface: getUserData(username) - Fetch user ID and following status
muteUser(userId) - Mute user via X.com API
unmuteUser(userId) - Unmute user via X.com API
saveMutedUser(user) - Save muted user to database
isWhitelisted(userId) - Check if user is whitelisted
countryCache - Persistent cache for country lookups
userIdCache - Persistent cache for user IDs
followingCache - Persistent cache for following status
